authors.author: John Gibson
John Gibson
Jesus, wir feiern deinen Sieg am Kreuz

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus we celebrate Your victory Jesus we revel in Your love Jesus we rejoice You've set us free Jesus Your death has brought us life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It was for freedom that Christ has set us free No longer to be subject to a yoke of Partiality So we're rejoicing in God's victory Our hearts responding to His love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His Spirit in us releases us from unbelief The way to Him is open with boldness we draw near And in His presence our problems disappear Our hearts responding to His love
